name: a2a-editor-vscode
description: Visual editor and viewer for A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol Agent Cards
author: SAP SE

commands.title: A2A: Open Current File as Agent Card

a2aAgentCard.mcp.enabled.description: Run an in-process MCP (Model Context Protocol) server so external tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, ...) can use the A2A tools.

a2aAgentCard.mcp.host.description: Host the MCP server binds to. Use 127.0.0.1 to restrict to this machine.

a2aAgentCard.mcp.port.description: Port the MCP server listens on.

chatParticipants.name: a2a
chatParticipants.description: Ask about agent cards, open them, or test A2A agents

commands.name: open
commands.description: Open an agent card file in the A2A Editor

commands.name: connect
commands.description: Fetch and display an agent card from a URL

commands.name: test
commands.description: Send a test message to an A2A agent

languageModelTools.name: a2aAgentCard_fetchAgentCard
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetch an A2A agent card from a URL. Tries well-known paths (/.well-known/agent.json, /.well-known/agent-card.json) before falling back to the direct URL. Returns the full agent card JSON with a summary of the agent's name, endpoint, description, and skills.

url.description: The URL of the A2A agent or direct path to an agent card JSON file

languageModelTools.name: a2aAgentCard_validateAgentCard
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Validate a JSON string as an A2A agent card. Checks for required fields (name, url) and reports present optional fields (skills, capabilities, provider, securitySchemes, etc.). Returns a validation summary including whether the card is valid, which fields are present or missing, and details about skills and capabilities.

content.description: The JSON string to validate as an A2A agent card

languageModelTools.name: a2aAgentCard_sendMessage
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send a test message to an A2A agent using the JSON-RPC 2.0 message/send method. Posts the message to the agent's URL and returns the response. Use this to test if an A2A agent is responding correctly.

url.description: The A2A agent endpoint URL to send the message to

message.description: The text message to send to the agent

scripts.compile: node scripts/copy-standalone.js && node esbuild.js --production && node esbuild.webview.js --production
scripts.lint: npm run prettier:check && npm run eslint
scripts.lint:fix: npm run prettier && npm run eslint:fix
